Full-Fleet Executive Control Room

A role-aware executive view of the 47,979-agent Agent Command Center, department gates, fleet status, observability, load tests, recovery drills, and safety boundaries.

Open Observability Command Wall Open Runtime Fleet Open Full-Fleet Load Test Open Department-Gated Runtime Open Continual Harness Operator

1. Executive status banner

This room summarizes the system for review. It does not execute commands.

Executive readiness is not runtime permission.

Enterprise readiness status: unknown
Recommended next step: none

6. Safety boundary cards

Rollback status is observed only; no rollback execution occurs here.

No page in this control room runs shell commands, deploys, rollbacks, alerts, or arbitrary actions.

Command execution: disabled
Deploy execution: disabled
Rollback execution: disabled
Alert sending: disabled
Arbitrary shell execution: disabled

Full-fleet control is department-gated, staged, audited, and circuit-breakered.
